subject: CDS mode
body:
Hi Dimitry,

How does Warp deal with movies collected on a K3 with CDS mode turned
on? Is there a button or knob that I need to turn so that Warp
discounts the first blank frame?

Best,
Pranav
--
Pranav Shah
Postdoctoral Research Fellow.

Division of Structural Biology,
Wellcome Trust Centre for Human Genetics,
University of Oxford,
Roosevelt Drive, Oxford OX3 7BN,
UK
